detail.description:
Dive into the thrilling universe of trucks with an addictive Match-3 puzzle game.

Embark on a journey of unmatched realism and experience the exhilaration of Truck Simulator, all within a single game.

Experience a unique blend of simulation and tycoon gameplay for an unparalleled gaming experience.

Personalize your trucks with customizable lights, bumpers, horns, and more!

Assemble the ultimate fleet of trucks you've always dreamed of.

Stay tuned for frequent updates and more exciting featu
detail.recentChanges:
Ready for an exciting update?

- 100 new levels—thrilling challenges await!
- Repair and customize the brand-new truck Blessing Harvest
- The new merge event Anniversary Gala is now live
- The new limited-time custom truck event Steam Knight is coming soon
- Anniversary Puzzle is here—win 2nd Anniversary limited garage decorations and an avatar frame!

More festival-limited rewards have been added in-game—log in and check them out!

eventMentions.text: the game is fun with constant events which keeps it interesting. however, it becomes very frustratin
there are no new vehicles to re-build. it's the same ones and the same people.
